title: anchusa officinalis subsp. leucantha
intro: Anchusa officinalis subsp. leucantha, also known as White Alkanet, is a plant species in the borage family, characterized by its tall stature and showy white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, and its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of White Alkanet include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. White Alkanet is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
